mainEntity.name: Forklift malfunction injury: comp or product liability in Holladay?
mainEntity.text: Forklift malfunction injury: comp or product liability in Holladay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Both: comp for basics, sue manufacturer for defects proving negligence or design flaw.[3][6]

suggestedAnswer.text: Forklifts common culprits. Black box data, recall checks key. Holladay suits recover extras like pain damages.[3][6]
